evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: modellering, tester, dokumentation; Ensuring clear definitions and high data quality
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Ownership of testing and documentation in dbt layer, plus explicit data quality framing, signals rigour over velocity.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Regulated environment is preferred but not required; responsibilities lack explicit compliance/financial language, placing this at moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: Business stakeholders; BI users/organizational adoption; data consumers
evidence.data_team_maturity: Äga och utveckla dbt-lagret; semantic layers; self-serve analytics framing
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in core responsibilities and reference to scaling/improving existing data function signal mid-maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: Äga och utveckla dbt-lagret (modellering, tester, dokumentation); semantic layers; Power BI dashboards
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific tool names with precise application context and clear technical methodology names indicate hiring manager authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: dbt-lagret (internal data platform); data-driven organizational transformation (commercial/strategic impact)
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Primary orientation is internal_data (dbt, semantic layers), but equal weight on driving commercial data-driven transformation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Äga och utveckla dbt-lagret; driving data-driven organizational transformation
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Ownership verbs ('äga') and strategic framing around transformation indicate strategic autonomy over the data modeling domain.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools, LLMs, or AI-adjacent responsibilities anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: tester (as part of core responsibility: modellering, tester, dokumentation)
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is listed as an owned responsibility within the dbt layer ownership, not as a tool requirement.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Ensuring clear definitions and high data quality; Data governance expertise
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Quality and governance framing signals moderate loss aversion — concern with reliability but secondary to delivery capability.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Äga och utveckla dbt-lagret; improve and scale existing function
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Develop/improve framing on existing dbt layer indicates fix_scale — enhancing established infrastructure.
evidence.language_gate: Swedish implied by Stockholm location and company context; not explicitly stated
evidence.loss_aversion: Data governance expertise and ensuring clear definitions signal operational reliability concerns in a mid-maturity team.
